title: Kushner’s Thrive Holdings in Talks to Raise at Least $2 Billion
snippet: Thrive Holdings, an offshoot of Joshua Kushner’s venture capital firm Thrive Capital, is in discussions to raise at least $2 billion, according to people familiar with the talks.
contentText: Thrive Holdings, an offshoot of Joshua Kushner’s venture capital firm Thrive Capital, is in discussions to raise at least $2 billion, according to people familiar with the talks.

title: BYD Stock Rebound Gathers Pace as Oil Shock Drives EV Sales Boom
snippet: BYD Co. shares are on track for their best month in over a year, as surging oil prices due to the Iran war brighten the outlook for electric vehicle sales.
contentText: BYD Co. shares are on track for their best month in over a year, as surging oil prices due to the Iran war brighten the outlook for electric vehicle sales.

title: Anthropic Wins Court Order Pausing Trump Ban on AI Tool
snippet: Anthropic PBC won a court order blocking a Trump administration ban on government use of the company’s artificial intelligence technology, after the Claude chatbot maker argued the move could cost it billions in lost re…
contentText: Anthropic PBC won a court order blocking a Trump administration ban on government use of the company’s artificial intelligence technology, after the Claude chatbot maker argued the move could cost it billions in lost revenue.

title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
snippet: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.
contentText: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

title: Antitrust Agencies Should Be Wary of AI Scrutiny, Official Says
snippet: The market for artificial intelligence is competitive, evolving rapidly, and antitrust enforcers should be wary of intervening, a senior White House official said.
contentText: The market for artificial intelligence is competitive, evolving rapidly, and antitrust enforcers should be wary of intervening, a senior White House official said.

title: Apple discontinues Mac Pro after 20 years — system had been in stuck in stasis with M2 Ultra since 2023
snippet: Apple has discontinued its Mac Pro tower, which hasn't been updated since a version with the M2 Ultra processor arrived in 2023.
contentText: Apple has discontinued its Mac Pro tower, which hasn't been updated since a version with the M2 Ultra processor arrived in 2023.

title: Customize your AWS Management Console experience with visual settings including account color, region and service visibility
snippet: AWS introduces visual customization capability in AWS Management Console that enables selective display of relevant AWS Regions and services for your team members. By hiding unused Regions and services, you can reduce c…
contentText: In August 2025, we introduced AWS User Experience Customization (UXC) capability to tailor user interfaces (UIs) to meet your specific needs and complete your tasks efficiently. With this capability, your account administrator can customize some UI component of AWS Management Console , such as assigning a color to an AWS account for easier identification. Today, we’re announcing additional customization capability in UXC that enables selective display of relevant AWS Regions and services for your team members. By hiding unused Regions and services, you can reduce cognitive load and eliminate unnecessary clicks and scrolling, helping you focus better and work faster. With this launch, we offer the ability to customize account color, Region, and service visibility together. Categorize accou…

title: Apple Discontinues Mac Pro Desktop in Favor of the Mac Studio
snippet: Apple Inc. on Thursday discontinued the Mac Pro desktop, its highest-end computer aimed at video editors, photographers and other advanced users.
contentText: Apple Inc. on Thursday discontinued the Mac Pro desktop, its highest-end computer aimed at video editors, photographers and other advanced users.

title: Senate Bill Seeks to Curb Insider Bets on Prediction Markets
snippet: A bipartisan group of senators introduced legislation Thursday that would require lawmakers and government employees to disclose any bets they place through prediction markets in a bid to prevent public officials from p…
contentText: A bipartisan group of senators introduced legislation Thursday that would require lawmakers and government employees to disclose any bets they place through prediction markets in a bid to prevent public officials from profiting on privileged information.

title: AMD’s new desktop CPU oozes cache out of all 16 cores
snippet: Turns out massive caches are good for more than games. House of Zen boasts 5-13% perf boost over prior-gen part AMD aims to extend its lead in desktop gaming with a new CPU, dubbed the Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition. Thi…
contentText: Turns out massive caches are good for more than games. House of Zen boasts 5-13% perf boost over prior-gen part AMD aims to extend its lead in desktop gaming with a new CPU, dubbed the Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition. This top-of-the-line part has 16 cores fed by an absolutely massive 208 MB pool of cache, with memory spread across both CCDs.…

title: Jury Finds Meta, Google Liable for Addiction | Bloomberg Tech 3/26/2026
snippet: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss the jury verdict holding Google and Meta liable for a young woman’s social media addiction. Plus, the case in California was just the start of thousands of similar cases t…
contentText: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss the jury verdict holding Google and Meta liable for a young woman’s social media addiction. Plus, the case in California was just the start of thousands of similar cases that could lead to impacts on the businesses of social media companies. And Google researchers tout a new compression technique for LLMs and vector search engines, sending shares of memory and storage companies lower. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'Empathetic' Salesforce bots to help those fired by uncaring humans

title: Apple Gives iPhone Designers Rare Bonuses to Fight AI Firm Poaching
snippet: Apple Inc. awarded rare bonuses to iPhone hardware designers this week, aiming to stem a wave of departures to AI startups like OpenAI that are building their own devices.
contentText: Apple Inc. awarded rare bonuses to iPhone hardware designers this week, aiming to stem a wave of departures to AI startups like OpenAI that are building their own devices.

title: Veritone Leans Into Oracle Cloud to Scale AI Data Pipelines

contentText: A new, multi-year deal positions OCI as backbone for Veritone’s AI stack, as the company doubles down on managing and monetizing unstructured data at scale.

title: Google Gemini Adds Tool to Make It Easier to Switch From ChatGPT
snippet: Google released new tools for its Gemini artificial intelligence assistant that will let users upload chat history and context from other AI apps, a move to lure users from rivals like OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Anthropic PBC…
contentText: Google released new tools for its Gemini artificial intelligence assistant that will let users upload chat history and context from other AI apps, a move to lure users from rivals like OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Anthropic PBC’s Claude.

title: OpenClaw Creator Says US Can Learn From China’s AI Adoption
snippet: While the AI tool has taken off in China, the reaction in the US has been more mixed
contentText: While the AI tool has taken off in China, the reaction in the US has been more mixed

title: Nvidia Sees First Bout of Retail-Investor Selling Since July
snippet: Individual investors have long piled into shares of Nvidia Corp., whose meteoric surge turned it into the biggest company in the S&P 500 Index. But on Wednesday they dumped the stock for the first time since July, signa…
contentText: Individual investors have long piled into shares of Nvidia Corp., whose meteoric surge turned it into the biggest company in the S&P 500 Index. But on Wednesday they dumped the stock for the first time since July, signaling a potential shift as the Iran war pulls the market down from its AI-fueled rally.

title: SpaceX Lines Up April Investor Briefings as IPO Questions Swirl

contentText: SpaceX is telling prospective IPO investors to expect briefings in April from company executives, according to people familiar with the matter, as advisers scramble to file for potentially the biggest listing of all time.

title: Meta Increases Investment in El Paso Data Center to $10 Billion
snippet: Meta Platforms Inc. will spend more than $10 billion to develop a data center in El Paso, Texas, a jump from prior projections and the latest in a series of major investments focused on the infrastructure needed to supp…
contentText: Meta Platforms Inc. will spend more than $10 billion to develop a data center in El Paso, Texas, a jump from prior projections and the latest in a series of major investments focused on the infrastructure needed to support its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Intel confirms rumored Core Ultra 9 290K Plus has been scrapped — potential Core Ultra 9 285KS Special Edition also off the table as Arrow Lake refresh rolls out

contentText: Intel has confirmed it has scrapped the Core Ultra 9 295K Plus, and will not be releasing a Special Edition "KS" part for its Core Ultra 200S series lineup.

title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills

contentText: Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

title: Apple Plans to Open Up Siri to Rival AI Assistants in iOS 27 Update
snippet: Apple Inc. plans to open Siri to outside artificial intelligence assistants, a major move aimed at bolstering the iPhone as an AI platform.
contentText: Apple Inc. plans to open Siri to outside artificial intelligence assistants, a major move aimed at bolstering the iPhone as an AI platform.

title: Trump Tech Adviser Sees Path to AI Bill That Even Democrats Like
snippet: White House adviser David Sacks said Congress could pass bipartisan artificial intelligence legislation within months, a move that would fulfill President Donald Trump’s pledge to create a national playbook for regulati…
contentText: White House adviser David Sacks said Congress could pass bipartisan artificial intelligence legislation within months, a move that would fulfill President Donald Trump’s pledge to create a national playbook for regulating the emerging technology.

title: Construct Capital Raises $300 Million to Back Foundational Industries
snippet: Investor interest in backing startups in foundational industries has been growing. Rachel Holt, co-founder and managing partner of Construct Capital, discusses why the firm has been focused on this area since 2020. She…
contentText: Investor interest in backing startups in foundational industries has been growing. Rachel Holt, co-founder and managing partner of Construct Capital, discusses why the firm has been focused on this area since 2020. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European PE Giant Permira Looks to Buy Beaten Up Software Loans
snippet: Permira, the €85 billion ($98 billion) global private equity firm which lends to technology companies, is finding opportunity in software loans battered by fears of AI disruption.
contentText: Permira, the €85 billion ($98 billion) global private equity firm which lends to technology companies, is finding opportunity in software loans battered by fears of AI disruption.

title: Chip Security Bill Advances in House After Super Micro Case
snippet: A House panel advanced legislation that would require the Commerce Department to demand chipmakers do more to keep AI technology from being smuggled to China, an effort that’s gained new urgency after last week’s indict…
contentText: A House panel advanced legislation that would require the Commerce Department to demand chipmakers do more to keep AI technology from being smuggled to China, an effort that’s gained new urgency after last week’s indictment of a Super Micro Computer Inc. co-founder for allegedly diverting Nvidia Corp. processors to Chinese buyers.

title: Chip Selloff Deepens After Google Memory Touts Breakthrough
snippet: Bloomberg's Mandeep Singh joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." Memory chip stocks extended their losses on Thursday after Alphabet Inc.’s Google publicized research on a new algorithm that could allow more efficient…
contentText: Bloomberg's Mandeep Singh joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." Memory chip stocks extended their losses on Thursday after Alphabet Inc.’s Google publicized research on a new algorithm that could allow more efficient use of the storage needed for artificial intelligence development. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dutch Court Bans XAI’s Grok From Nonconsensual Undressing
snippet: An Amsterdam court banned Elon Musk’s xAI from generating and distributing undressed images of people in the Netherlands without permission, the latest in wider pushback against the controversial feature.
contentText: An Amsterdam court banned Elon Musk’s xAI from generating and distributing undressed images of people in the Netherlands without permission, the latest in wider pushback against the controversial feature.
